checkpoints.title: Start Drive from Prague
checkpoints.description: Begin your journey from Prague to Canazei. The drive is approximately 11 hours, so be prepared for a long day on the road.

checkpoints.title: Lunch Break in Austria
checkpoints.description: Stop for a quick lunch break in a scenic town in Austria. Enjoy the views and stretch your legs.

checkpoints.title: Arrive in Canazei
checkpoints.description: Check-in at your Airbnb in Canazei and settle in after the long drive.

checkpoints.title: Dinner in Canazei
checkpoints.description: Enjoy dinner at a local restaurant in Canazei. Try the local specialties like polenta and Tyrolean dumplings.

days.day: 27.8.2024 - Hike to Lago di Fedaia and Marmolada Glacier

checkpoints.title: Breakfast at Airbnb
checkpoints.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast to prepare for a day of hiking.

checkpoints.title: Drive to Lago di Fedaia
checkpoints.description: Drive to Lago di Fedaia, a beautiful lake at the base of Marmolada, the highest mountain in the Dolomites.

checkpoints.title: Hike Around Lago di Fedaia
checkpoints.description: Explore the scenic trails around the lake with views of the Marmolada Glacier. Consider taking the cable car up to the glacier for a closer look.

checkpoints.title: Picnic Lunch by the Lake
checkpoints.description: Enjoy a picnic lunch by the lake. Remember to pack enough food and water.

checkpoints.title: Climb Marmolada Via Ferrata
checkpoints.description: If you're up for a challenge, try the via ferrata on Marmolada. Make sure you have the proper gear and check the weather conditions.

checkpoints.title: Return to Canazei
checkpoints.description: Drive back to Canazei to relax and unwind after a day of adventure.

checkpoints.title: Dinner
checkpoints.description: Enjoy a relaxing dinner at a local pizzeria in Canazei.

days.day: 28.8.2024 - Hike in Val di Fassa and Visit Lago di Carezza

checkpoints.title: Breakfast at Airbnb
checkpoints.description: Prepare for another adventurous day with a solid breakfast.

checkpoints.title: Hike in Val di Fassa
checkpoints.description: Explore the hiking trails in Val di Fassa, offering stunning views of the surrounding Dolomite peaks.

checkpoints.title: Lunch at Rifugio
checkpoints.description: Have lunch at a mountain hut (rifugio) along the trail, enjoying local dishes with a view.

checkpoints.title: Drive to Lago di Carezza
checkpoints.description: Drive to the picturesque Lago di Carezza, also known as the 'Rainbow Lake' for its vibrant colors.

checkpoints.title: Visit Lago di Carezza
checkpoints.description: Walk around Lago di Carezza, taking in the stunning reflections of the surrounding mountains in the lake's clear waters.

checkpoints.title: Return to Canazei
checkpoints.description: Head back to Canazei to relax for the evening.

checkpoints.title: Dinner
checkpoints.description: Dinner at a cozy local restaurant, enjoying regional specialties.

days.day: 29.8.2024 - Flex Day: Explore or Camp in the Wild

checkpoints.title: Breakfast at Airbnb or Camp
checkpoints.description: Enjoy breakfast at your Airbnb or make a camp breakfast if you decide to camp.

checkpoints.title: Decide Your Adventure
checkpoints.description: Today is a flexible day. Choose from various options like exploring more hiking trails, visiting local attractions, or setting up a wild camp if the weather is good.

checkpoints.title: Lunch on the Trail or in Town
checkpoints.description: Depending on your choice, have lunch at a mountain hut or a local cafe in Canazei.

checkpoints.title: Explore More or Relax
checkpoints.description: Continue exploring the Dolomites, or take a relaxed day to unwind and prepare for your journey back home.

checkpoints.title: Prepare for Departure
checkpoints.description: Start packing and prepare for your departure the next day. If camping, ensure you're ready to break camp early.

checkpoints.title: Dinner in Canazei
checkpoints.description: Enjoy a farewell dinner at a local restaurant in Canazei.

checkpoints.title: Early Start and Drive Back to Prague
checkpoints.description: Begin your drive back to Prague early to make the most of the day.

checkpoints.title: Lunch Break in Austria
checkpoints.description: Stop for a lunch break and stretch your legs.

checkpoints.title: Arrive Back in Prague
checkpoints.description: Arrive back in Prague and reflect on your Dolomites adventure.
